name: Insight Acquisition Corp. Warrant
summary: Insight Acquisition Corp. Warrants entitle the holder to purchase one share of Class A common stock at an exercise price of $11.50. Insight Acquisition Corp. is a blank check company formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company focuses on targets within the financial technology, data and analytics, and software industries.
